title: Redstone Torch Backport Supporter
description: Make the New Redstone Torch compatible with Mods
body:
![New Redstone Torch with Create Mod](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/81HKpFAE/images/fb99124fc6edd49d819b131b5626a297012f6887.png)
# Feature
Simple resourse pack for New Redstone Torch and Mods.
Feel free to comment on the Mods you want me to add.
[Curseforge Link](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/texture-packs/redstone-torch-backport-mod)

# Supported
- Create
- Create: Connected
- quark
- Tom's Simple Storage Mod
